  'headline': '1 Services Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Turn Down',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Business services providers play a critical role for '

 {'date': '2026-03-06 00:19:56',
  'headline': 'How The Aramark (ARMK) Story Is Shifting With 2026 Growth '
              'Targets And New Contracts',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Aramark’s latest analyst update keeps the model fair value '

 {'date': '2026-02-17 05:30:53',
  'headline': '5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Aramark’s Q4 Earnings Call',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Aramark’s fourth-quarter results were well received by the '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/5-must-read-analyst-questions-053053047.html'},
 {'date': '2026-02-17 04:01:41',
  'headline': 'Aramark (ARMK): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?',

  'headline': 'Is Aramark (ARMK) Pricing Look Stretched After Mixed Returns '
